use serde::Deserialize;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Credentials {
    username: String,
    password: String,
    api_token: String,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct DatabaseConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    connection_string: String,
    secret_key: String,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct OAuthConfig {
    client_id: String,
    client_secret: String,
    private_key: String,
}

fn load_credentials(path: &str) -> Result<Credentials, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let creds: Credentials = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(creds)
}

fn load_db_config(path: &str) -> Result<DatabaseConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: DatabaseConfig = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}
